description: Two project proposals request the same lead data scientist. An agent must identify the conflict and propose a solution.

nodes.task_description: Review the resource plans for two new project proposals.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully loads the two plans.

nodes.task_description: Identify that both plans have requested 'Dr. Eva Rostova' as the lead data scientist for overlapping time periods.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the resource conflict.

nodes.task_description: Propose a solution, such as suggesting an alternative data scientist for one project or adjusting the timelines so they don't overlap.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides at least one viable solution to the conflict.
